features.evidence: I have not run into any issues and after using this machine I think the price is well worth it. This is a great computer at a very fair price.
Powerful computer with a long long, long battery life and size and weight that's perfect for traveling. the battery easily lasts through a full day.
value: average battery life in hours: 18 Hours

features.evidence: The display is stunningly clear and bright, making it perfect for work, streaming, or browsing. On top of that, the display is absolutely stunning.

Windows runs extremely fast and wakes up from sleep in only 1 second. If you’re looking for a powerful, future-ready laptop that will handle upcoming Windows upgrades with ease, the Dell XPS 13 is absolutely worth it.
Powerful computer with a long long, long battery life and size and weight that's perfect for traveling.
The trackpad and keyboard are amazing and blow the competition out of the water.
The trackpad and keyboard are amazing and blow the competition out of the water.
From the moment I powered it on, the speed and responsiveness were incredible — everything loads almost instantly and multitasking is effortless.
